description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy resembling a bear, with a rounded body and limbs, and a large, circular white patch on its belly. The toy's fur is a muted brown color, with darker shading and subtle fabric creases visible throughout its surface. Its face features two large, round black eyes, a small pink nose, and a tiny pink tongue sticking out, giving it a playful and endearing appearance. The ears are rounded and positioned symmetrically on top of the head, with lighter inner ear patches. The arms and legs are short and stubby, sewn to the sides of the body, and the back is plain with no additional markings or features. The overall texture appears soft and slightly wrinkled, typical of a well-loved stuffed animal.
description: A soft, brown plush bear with a white belly patch, round black eyes, and a small pink nose and tongue. It has rounded ears, stubby limbs, and a gently wrinkled fabric texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear's face, white belly patch, black eyes, pink nose, and tongue, with both arms and legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, protruding nose, and the arm and leg extending forward.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain brown surface, rounded head, and the backs of the arms and legs with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the head, nose, and the arm and leg on this side.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is playful and friendly, with wide, round black eyes and a small pink tongue sticking out beneath a tiny pink nose. There are no eyebrows or other features to suggest strong emotion, giving it a neutral yet endearing look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms slightly outstretched and legs extended forward, head facing straight ahead.
